abilities.description:
When you Strike or Clash, choose one.

  • Carve a path: Add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
  • Cleave them hard: Mark progress on a hit, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} [-2].

When you have your axe in hand, and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by using the promise of violence, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. On a strong hit with a match, take another +1 momentum.

When you make a tribute to a fallen foe [formidable or greater], choose how.

  • Bleed for it: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} [-your choice].
  • Mourn for it: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-your choice].

On a hit, mark progress the one next time you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} equal to your chosen suffer reduction.
